## Summary

Describe the user-visible and architectural effect.

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] Qt desktop check when QML/CXX-Qt changed
- [ ] Provider terms reviewed when provider behavior changed

## Risks

Call out platform mutations, schema changes, network behavior, secrets, and untrusted image input.
